arts.ttl: Why isn’t Bukayo Saka playing for Arsenal against Newcastle in the Carabao Cup today?
arts.sum: Arsenal are looking to win their first major silverware since the 2019/20 FA Cup this season and have given themselves a more than realistic opportunity to lift the Carabao Cup (also known as the EFL Cup or the League Cup), in which they face Newcastle United in the first leg of the semifinals on Tuesday (January 7). Saka was forced off midway through the first half of the 5-1 Premier League win over Crystal Palace on December 21, with The Gunners later revealing the winger had suffered a serious hamstring injury .

arts.ttl: Bitter Ange Postecoglou takes fresh Newcastle United swipe as Arsenal decision made
arts.sum: The new trial will see referees explain VAR decisions to the crowd via an in-stadium microphone during Newcastle's clash with Arsenal and Tottenham's encounter with Liverpool. Postecoglou then added: "But at the same time, I have to accept that it's coming in.

arts.ttl: Celtic have 'no right' to seal Kieran Tierney transfer return as pundit goes against the grain on Rodgers' Greg Taylor outburst
arts.sum: Tierney is set to leave Arsenal this month with and Stephen McGinn cannot understand the lack of stellar interest in the full back

arts.ttl: Arsenal fans left furious as Man Utd handed huge advantage for FA Cup showdown
arts.sum: Arsenal welcome Manchester United to the Emirates Stadium in the FA Cup third round on Sunday - and the 8,000 visiting supporters will be given the ideal spot to watch the two rivals collide

arts.ttl: Former Gunners boss Eidevall: 'The cloud lifted when I left Arsenal'
arts.sum: The ending was abrupt and not at all how Jonas Eidevall envisaged walking out of Arsenal. The Swedish head coach had spent just over three years in north London, having signed a new and improved contract last October, where the ambition was mutually agreed - restore Arsenal back to its former glory.

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Newcastle - Carabao Cup semi-final: Live score, team news and updates as depleted hosts look to take first-leg lead against in-form Magpies who have won their last six
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for the latest score, team news and updates as Arsenal host Newcastle in the Carabao Cup semi-final first leg.

arts.ttl: EXCLUSIVE: Vlahovic opportunity could force Arsenal transfer rethink
arts.sum: FootballTransfers understands that Arsenal have been handed an opportunity to reshape their January transfer strategy, with Juventus offering long-term target Dusan Vlahovic for a fee of around €55 million. Arteta has always insisted that Arsenal will act decisively if the right opportunity arises, and the availability of Vlahovic, at a reasonable price, could see the Gunners pivot away from other targets to secure the Serbian international’s signature.

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Newcastle LIVE: Team news, line-ups and latest updates from Carabao Cup semi-final
arts.sum: Eddie Howe’s men travel to the Emirates Stadium for the first leg of their league cup semi-final against the Gunners

arts.ttl: Viktor Gyokeres private feelings about transfer emerge as 'talks' begin amid Arsenal links
arts.sum: Manchester United's pursuit of Sporting Lisbon's star striker Viktor Gyokeres appears to have hit a snag amid continued links to Arsenal and interest from Bayern Munich. However, a report from the Daily Star suggests that Gyokeres may be having second thoughts about a potential switch to United, given the daunting task facing Amorim at the helm, as Arsenal continue to be linked with a move for the player.

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Newcastle LIVE! Carabao Cup match stream, latest team news, lineups, TV, prediction today
arts.sum: Emirates Stadium hosts semi-final first-leg tie as Gunners look to bounce back against in-form visitors
